build.//: development — a dev client build. Install this on your phone, then run `npx expo start --dev-client`. This is the build that enables expo-notifications (and any other native module Expo Go can't run). Produces a sideloadable APK on Android.
build.//preview: preview — a release-mode build for sharing/testing without the dev client. Also an installable APK.
build.//production: production — store-ready build (Android App Bundle for Google Play).
